description_long: This is a compact nightstand with a rectangular top surface and a distressed blue finish, giving it a weathered, urban look. The front features two drawers, each with a circular metal knob, and an open shelf at the bottom, providing both concealed and open storage. The sides and back are plain, with visible wear and subtle marbling in the paint, suggesting age or heavy use. The legs are straight and integrated into the frame, with a slight inward curve at the bottom front, adding a touch of character. The overall construction appears to be wooden, with metal hardware for the handles. This nightstand would fit well in an urban environment, such as a sidewalk, alley, or garage, where repurposed or secondhand furniture is common.
description: A distressed blue nightstand with two drawers, metal knobs, and an open lower shelf, featuring a weathered, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with circular metal knobs and an open shelf at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, distressed blue panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned blue back panel with visible wear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain blue panel and no hardware.
attribute_leg_design: straight integrated legs with slight inward curve at front
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
